# Benign commands that MUST stay silently allowed — the over-block guard. These
# use substitution / pipes / && in entirely ordinary ways. If the obfuscation
# hardening flags any of these, it is too aggressive (loud on normal coding).
#
ls -la
cat README.md
grep -r TODO ./src
echo hello && go build ./...
echo $(date)
echo $((1 + 2))
cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && make
VERSION=$(cat VERSION) && echo "building $VERSION"
git status && git diff --stat
npm test | tail -20
find . -name '*.go' | xargs gofmt -l
echo "${HOME}/bin is on PATH"
docker build -t app . && echo built
for f in *.txt; do wc -l "$f"; done
